skill.name: viral-generator-builder
skill.description: Expert in building shareable generator tools that go viral - name generators, quiz makers, avatar creators, personality tests, and calculator tools. Covers the psychology of sharing, viral mechanic...
skill.summary: Expert in building shareable generator tools that go viral - name generators, quiz makers, avatar cr...
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All static findings are false positives. The detected 'external_commands' patterns are markdown code block fences (backticks), not shell execution. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' flags are misreads of documentation text about hashing for deterministic generation. This is a design/architecture skill containing only documentation about viral generator patterns, not executable code.

content.value_statement: Create engaging generator tools like name generators, quizzes, and personality tests that people love to share. This skill provides architectural patterns and viral mechanics to maximize social sharing and engagement.
actual_capabilities: Design generator tool architecture with viral mechanics
Build quiz and personality test builders with weighted scoring
Create name and text generators with deterministic output
Optimize results for screenshot sharing on social media
Implement identity moment results that users want to show off
Design minimal input flows to maximize completion rates
limitations: Does not provide actual code implementation - only design patterns
Does not include hosting or deployment guidance
Does not cover backend infrastructure or databases
Does not provide pre-built templates or assets

use_cases.title: Marketing Team Creates Viral Quizzes
use_cases.description: Build engaging quiz tools that generate leads and drive social traffic

use_cases.title: Developer Prototypes Generator Ideas
use_cases.description: Quickly design viral tool architecture before writing code

use_cases.title: Content Creator Builds Engagement Tools
use_cases.description: Create shareable generators for audience growth

prompt_templates.title: Simple Name Generator
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a name generator that creates unique usernames. Include input design, deterministic algorithm for consistent results, and shareable result format.

prompt_templates.title: Personality Quiz Builder
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 7-question personality quiz with 5 result categories. Include question types, weighted scoring logic, and shareable result card design.

prompt_templates.title: Viral Result Optimization
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze and improve a generator result to maximize screenshot sharing. Focus on identity moments, visual design, and social shareability.

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Input Generator
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a generator that takes multiple inputs like name and birthday to create a personalized prediction. Include input flow and result personalization.

output_examples.input: Build a Star Wars name generator
output_examples.output: Generator architecture with: Input (first + last name) → Algorithm (combine letters to create Galactic name) → Result (shareable card with Star Wars title and meaning)

output_examples.input: Design a quiz that tells users their personality type
output_examples.output: Quiz structure: 8 binary questions → Type scoring → 4 personality results → Shareable result card with percentage match and description

best_practices: Start with minimal input (name or birthday) to maximize completion rates
Make results identity-forming so users want to share them
Design results to look great as screenshots for social sharing
anti_patterns: Asking for too much input upfront causes users to drop off
Generic results like 'You are creative' have no share value
Boring share cards get scrolled past in social feeds

faq.question: What is a viral generator tool?
faq.answer: A viral generator is an interactive tool that creates personalized results people want to share. Examples include name generators, quizzes, personality tests, and calculators.

faq.question: Do I need coding skills to use this skill?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides architectural patterns and design guidance. You can apply these concepts with any website builder or coding framework.

faq.question: What makes a result shareable?
faq.answer: Shareable results are identity-forming, visually appealing, and create 'identity moments' that users want to show off to others.

faq.question: How many questions should a quiz have?
faq.answer: Aim for 5-10 questions. Too few feel superficial, too many cause drop-off. Use engaging question types like image choices or this-or-that format.

faq.question: Can I use this for commercial projects?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill provides design patterns you can implement in any project, including commercial products.

faq.question: What is deterministic generation?
faq.answer: Deterministic generation means the same input always produces the same output. This makes results shareable because friends get identical results when using the same input.
